channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TSC Seeks Applications for Two New Member Positions
item.description: The Teachers Service Commission (TSC) has announced two open positions for members, inviting Kenyans to apply for these critical roles. Candidates must be Kenyan citizens with a degree from a recognis...

item.title: Consumer Reports Names 2026 Subaru Crosstrek Top Subcompact SUV Amid Classification Debate
item.description: The 2026 Subaru Crosstrek has been named Consumer Reports’ top pick in the subcompact SUV category, praised for its comfortable ride, practical size, and strong all-wheel-drive capability. Starting at...

item.title: APC Condemns Makinde Over ‘Operation Wetie’ Comment, Raises Security Concerns
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don strongly criticise Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, over one statement wey him make during an opposition summit for Ibadan, where him reference “Operation Weti...

item.title: Analysis of the Strategic Consequences of Trump’s Actions Toward Iran
item.description: The article outlines ten key points regarding former President Donald Trump's decision to engage militarily with Iran. It emphasizes that Israel played a significant role in urging the U.S. into confl...

item.title: Social Media Sparks Debate Over Tinubu and Atiku Sleeping at Public Events
item.description: For Naija, social media don burst with tori after images show President Bola Tinubu dey appear to doze during official events, na response to criticism wey former Vice President Atiku Abubakar face. T...

item.title: Gunfire interrupts White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington D.C.
item.description: During the annual White House Correspondents’ Association dinner at the Washington Hilton on April 26, 2026, a gunman, later identified as 31-year-old Cole Tomas Allen from California, opened fire nea...

item.title: Celebrities join London Marathon 2026 as Tilly Ramsay, Cynthia Erivo and charity runners complete the race
item.description: The 2026 London Marathon saw a mix of elite athletes, celebrities and charity participants take on the 26.2-mile course across the capital. Among the notable finishers was Tilly Ramsay, who completed ...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs Focused on Their Own Campaign, Not Title Race
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Khalil Ben Youssef has emphasised that the team’s attention is solely on their own performances and results, rather than the ongoing title race between Orlando Pirates and Mamel...

item.title: Police seize tampered LPG cylinders in Mariveles, Bataan
item.description: Police in Mariveles, Bataan have arrested five individuals and confiscated hundreds of tampered liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) cylinders in a sting operation on Friday. The operation followed reports o...

item.title: African Exporters Anticipate Growth from China’s Zero-Tariff Policy at Zimbabwe Trade Fair
item.description: At the Zimbabwe International Trade Fair, African exporters expressed optimism about China’s upcoming zero-tariff policy, which will take effect on May 1 for products from 53 African countries with di...

item.title: DNA Confirms Mezcal Bottle Larvae Are All Agave Redworm Moth Caterpillars
item.description: For decades, the curious 'worm' found in some mezcal bottles puzzled both enthusiasts and scientists. A new study by researchers at the Florida Museum of Natural History has finally clarified the myst...

item.title: Landmark Legal Case Against Chicken Producer and Water Company Over River Pollution
item.description: A landmark legal case is set to begin at the High Court in London involving Avara Foods, a major chicken producer, and Welsh Water, both accused of polluting the rivers Wye, Lugg, and Usk. Over 4,500 ...

item.title: Tanzania and region push for real action on women empowerment in agriculture
item.description: Governments in Eastern and Southern Africa are being urged to move beyond just policies and take concrete steps to empower women in food systems, recognising that women play a central role in farming,...

item.title: EC to implement strict security for West Bengal's second phase of assembly elections
item.description: Ahead of the second phase of the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, the Election Commission of India (ECI) has introduced a robust security plan to ensure smooth voting. The second phase, taking pla...

item.title: Fuel Price Adjustments for the Week of April 27, 2026: A Detailed Overview
item.description: Fuel prices in the Philippines are expected to see a slight decrease this week, although the global oil market remains unpredictable due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. According to the Departmen...

item.title: Leonie Hughes' Journey from Adversity to Becoming a Barrister
item.description: Leonie Hughes, aged 30, has captured public attention with her story of resilience and determination. Growing up on a council estate in Hillingdon, north-west London, Hughes faced a challenging childh...

item.title: Wumi Toriola and Enioluwa Clash Over Greeting Etiquette at Lagos Event
item.description: Nollywood actress Wumi Toriola and popular influencer Enioluwa Adeoluwa get small drama for one Lagos event after misunderstanding over greeting. According to reports, the incident happen when Wumi de...

item.title: 16-year-old son of Paralympian wins Maldon Mud Race without training
item.description: Albert Crates, the 16-year-old son of British Paralympian Danny Crates, shocked hundreds of competitors to win the 2026 Maldon Mud Race, a gruelling race across a muddy stretch of the River Blackwater...

item.title: Elon Musk Pushes to Transform X Into an All-in-One Financial and Social Platform
item.description: Elon Musk is inching closer to his vision of turning X (formerly Twitter) into an all-encompassing 'super app.' Set to launch a new financial service tool this month, X's new offering promises users a...

item.title: Google Analyzes Web-Based Prompt Injection Attacks Targeting AI Systems
item.description: Google's Threat Intelligence team investigated potential prompt injection attacks targeting AI agents that browse the web. Using the Common Crawl repository, which contains billions of publicly access...
